reason: Adjusting the minimum password age via chage is a standard authentication hardening action that does not affect login ability; it only restricts how soon a password can be changed again, posing minimal risk of lockout.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Users who recently changed their password may be temporarily prevented from changing it again until the minimum age elapses; Possible user inconvenience if they need to change password sooner than 1 day
